evals.name: basic-article-clip
evals.prompt: Clip this article to my knowledge base: https://www.anthropic.com/research/building-effective-agents
evals.expected_output: A markdown file created in 00-raw/inbox/ with proper frontmatter including title, author, source, date, and AI-extracted tags. Content should be about AI agents.

evals.name: link-discovery
evals.prompt: 抓取这篇文章并评估相关链接：https://simonwillison.net/2024/Dec/19/llm-patterns/
evals.expected_output: Clipped article with AI-assessed links. Should identify related posts on simonwillison.net and evaluate if they're worth clipping. Category should be AI-Agent or Knowledge-Work.

evals.name: chinese-content
evals.expected_output: Chinese article clipped with proper frontmatter. Language should be detected and noted. Should handle Chinese characters correctly.
